title: Responsive multi-column layout component with grid and alignment support
purpose: Provides a flexible grid-based layout component that automatically adjusts column count and spacing based on screen size and configuration options.
module_context: Exports a Columns component that accepts props for column count, gap, responsiveness, alignment, and styling. Includes helper functions to generate CSS classes for gap, alignment, and column layout.

steps.content: Map the gap value to a corresponding CSS gap class.
Return the appropriate gap class based on the input value.
Default to gap-4 when no valid gap value is provided.
Map the alignment value to a corresponding CSS items alignment class.
Return the appropriate alignment class based on the input value.
Default to items-stretch when no valid alignment value is provided.
Generate the base grid column class based on the number of columns.
IF responsive mode is enabled, apply mobile-first grid classes with tablet and desktop breakpoints.
Return the appropriate responsive or static column classes.
IF the hidden prop is true, return null immediately.
Generate CSS classes for gap, alignment, and column layout.
Convert the children to an array for processing.
Render a grid container with the generated classes and children.
Wrap each child in a flex-col div to maintain proper layout structure.
